arts.sum: Two of European football’s leading clubs have set their sights on the signature of Atlético Madrid talent Pablo Barrios. That’s according to German outlet BILD, as cited by Mundo Deportivo,…

arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively reveal that Bayern Munich have joined the chase for Mason Greenwood and Manchester United could stand to profit from their sell-on...

arts.ttl: Celtic’s Kasper Schmeichel reveals he nearly joined Bayern Munich in 2022
arts.sum: When Manuel Neuer broke his leg in a rather ludicrous ski accident, Bayern Munich was panicking and all of a sudden needed to find a six-month stand in as the legendary German goalkeeper recovered. But another candidate who nearly joined to replace Neuer will be facing Bayern in the upcoming Champions League tie against Celtic Glasgow.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Celtic: Live stream, game time thread, odds, prediction, how to watch
arts.sum: With a 2-1 lead headed back to the fortress that is the Allianz Arena, it’s safe to say that the odds are heavily in favor of Bayern advancing to the Round of 16. Celtic will bide their time in the first half, looking to steal a cheap goal on the counterattack or a set piece.

arts.ttl: 9 best photos of Celtic fans in Munich as hilarious pub chalkboard attempts to entice thirsty punters
arts.sum: Hoops fans have travelled to Bavaria in their droves hoping to see their team pull off a mighty shock at the Allianz Arena tonight

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Celtic LIVE: Team news and line-ups from Champions League play-off clash
arts.sum: The Bundesliga leaders hold a 2-1 advantage on aggregate after the first leg

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers told Celtic first-team player ‘isn’t Champions League quality’
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers told that Greg Taylor ‘isn’t Champions League quality’ for Celtic “We talk about the Champions League and the level of opposition you are playing, it can be a step too far for some players,” said Allan.

arts.ttl: John Hartson surprisingly tells Troy Deeney one Celtic hero 'might not even play' vs Bayern Munich
arts.sum: However, Hoops hero John Hartson reckons that one of Rodgers’ signings could be left out of the game tonight as discussion rages about who could start up front for Celtic against Bayern Munich . John Hartson’s big Jeffrey Schlupp/Greg Taylor starting prediction for Celtic vs Bayern Munich

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Jamal Musiala cautions against looking too far ahead at the 2025 UCL Finale Dahoam
arts.sum: Yet, somehow, Bayern also fell at the last hurdle there, watching in agony as Chelsea FC triumphed in a penalty shootout to complete the hat trick of second place finishes. Now wearing the Bavarian red, it is partly Musiala’s job to lead Bayern to the 2025 Champions League final in the Allianz Arena.
